channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Jane Krakowski on her career in television and theatre
item.description: Jane Krakowski reflects on her prolific career across television and theatre, highlighting her roles in landmark series such as Ally McBeal, 30 Rock, and Unbreakable Kimmy Schmidt. From 1997 to 2002, ...

item.title: Australia faces growing debate over immigration policy and social cohesion
item.description: Australians are increasingly calling for an honest and open discussion about immigration. Historically, the country embraced multiculturalism and took pride in being a tolerant society that respected ...

item.title: Instacart Buys Colombia’s Instaleap to Grow Its Enterprise Tech Globally
item.description: Instacart announced its acquisition of Instaleap, a Colombia-based grocery technology company, as part of its broader strategy to expand its enterprise platform across international markets. Founded i...

item.title: A Travel Agent Explains Common Misconceptions About Five-Star Hotels
item.description: A professional travel agent clarifies common misunderstandings about five-star hotels, emphasizing that luxury ratings do not always match guest expectations. Many travelers assume that a five-star ra...

item.title: Queensland activist challenges new hate speech law after being charged for banned protest slogan
item.description: Catholic anti-war activist Jim Dowling, aged 70, has become one of the first people in Queensland to face charges under new laws banning certain protest slogans. Dowling appeared barefoot in Brisbane ...

item.title: RTI Commissioner urges daily practice of Ambedkar’s principles at Andhra University event
item.description: At a programme held at Andhra University in Visakhapatnam on the occasion of Ambedkar Jayanti, Andhra Pradesh State Right to Information (RTI) Commissioner P.S. Naidu emphasised that Dr. B.R. Ambedkar...

item.title: Government implements 2.25 hours daily peak-hour loadshedding to control electricity tariffs due to LNG shortage
item.description: The Government of Pakistan has announced a limited loadshedding plan of 2.25 hours daily during peak hours from 5:00pm to 1:00am across most parts of the country due to fuel constraints. This decision...

item.title: Heavy security as ADC holds national convention amid leadership crisis
item.description: Security presence full ground for Abuja as African Democratic Congress (ADC) hold their national convention for Rainbow Event Center, where about 7,000 delegates gather to elect new National Working C...

item.title: Inanda Community Policing Forum Battles Gang Influence and Protects Youth
item.description: The Inanda Community Policing Forum (CPF) has reaffirmed its commitment to fighting gang violence and safeguarding local youth from criminal recruitment, despite the grave risks faced by its members. ...

item.title: Errol Apacible recounts the creative process behind BINI’s ‘Pantropiko’ Coachella performance
item.description: Errol Apacible, one of the music producers behind BINI’s viral hit 'Pantropiko,' recently gave fans a look into how he crafted the group’s unforgettable dance break for their performance at the 2026 C...

item.title: Alibaba’s Koko Tech Pakistan receives SECP approval to offer Buy Now Pay Later services
item.description: On April 14, 2026, the Securities and Exchange Commission of Pakistan (SECP) announced that it had awarded a Buy Now Pay Later (BNPL) licence to Koko Tech Pakistan Pvt. Ltd. (KTPL), a subsidiary of Al...

item.title: Western Cape High Court orders ex-husband to reimburse ex-wife for marriage-related expenses under nafaqah ruling
item.description: The Western Cape High Court has ruled that a man must repay his former wife close to R100,000 after she covered most of the household and medical expenses during their brief marriage. The case centred...

item.title: Pope Leo visits Algeria to honour St. Augustine and promote peace
item.description: Pope Leo XIV visited Annaba, Algeria, retracing the life and legacy of St. Augustine, the fifth-century Christian theologian. Arriving under heavy security and rain, the pope prayed among the ruins of...

item.title: The Dreamlike Digital Art of Justin Peters
item.description: Digital artist Justin Peters presents an imaginative collection of surreal photo compositions in his latest showcase, where nature and human creativity merge in extraordinary ways. The pieces feature ...

item.title: Bihar Gets New CM, Stalin Warns of Statewide Protest Over Delimitation
item.description: So, there's been quite a lot of political drama in India today, *yaar*. Bihar’s Nitish Kumar, he's resigned as Chief Minister, leaving everyone a bit surprised. He held a final cabinet meeting before ...

item.title: Australia to invest billions in drones and autonomous military systems under 2026 Defence Strategy
item.description: Australia’s 2026 National Defence Strategy will see a significant focus on drones and other uncrewed and autonomous systems. Defence Minister Richard Marles is set to unveil the strategy, which includ...

item.title: Tanzania clarifies its role in EACOP crude oil pipeline transit
item.description: The Tanzanian government has explained clearly the country’s role in the East African Crude Oil Pipeline (EACOP) project. Deputy Minister for Energy, Salome Makamba, told Parliament in Dodoma that Tan...

item.title: Mission Viejo authorities investigate abandoned puppy incident in coyote-prone area
item.description: Mission Viejo Animal Services is seeking public assistance to identify a man captured on surveillance video abandoning a small puppy near an animal urgent care facility in an area known for coyotes. T...

item.title: BoT proposes new cybersecurity framework to strengthen digital banking safety
item.description: The Bank of Tanzania (BoT) is developing new Cybersecurity Guidelines for Financial Service Providers, 2026, aimed at addressing a sharp rise in digital fraud and improving public confidence in the co...

item.title: Domain expands drone operations to enhance property listings with 3D imaging
item.description: Domain, the US-owned real estate listings portal, is investing in its own fleet of drone pilots to improve the way homes are presented for sale. Currently, the company employs 25 pilots, but it aims t...
